nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 貝阿塔島
nodes.summary: 貝阿塔島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括珠眼嘲鸫、Green-tailed warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Hispaniolan pine forests
nodes.summary: Hispaniolan pine forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Hispaniolan lizard cuckoo、中美夜鹰、Hispaniolan nightjar等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Green-tailed warbler
nodes.summary: Green-tailed warbler（Green-tailed warbler，学名 Microligea palustris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林、灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: Cordillera Central, Dominican Republic
nodes.summary: Cordillera Central, Dominican Republic是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括La Selle thrush、Hispaniolan crossbill、Antillean siskin等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the green-tailed warbler is found in the highlands of central Hispaniola that span the border between Haiti and the Dominican Republic, though it is found almost entirely in the latter country

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There it inhabits broadleaf and pine montane forest with a dense understory at elevations up to about

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: vasta is a disjunct population found in the southwestern Dominican Republic lowlands and Beata Island

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: There it inhabits broadleaf and pine montane forest with a dense understory at elevations up to about

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: There, it inhabits semi-arid scrublands near sea level

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The main potential threats are continuing habitat destruction and predation by introduced small Indian mongooses. It is considered locally common
